mapper.insert: INSERT INTO EVS_PARAM_OBJECT ( SEQ, RESUME_SEQ, EVS_TYPE, CODE_NO, CODE_NAME, FORMULA, IS_INCLUDE, EVS_GRADE, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{resumeSeq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{evsType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{codeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{codeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{formula, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NVL(#{isInclude, jdbcType=VARCHAR},0), #{evsGrade, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 1, #{orderNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR},200, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE EVS_PARAM_OBJECT SET EVS_TYPE = #{evsType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CODE_NO = #{codeNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CODE_NAME = #{codeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, FORMULA = GET_CODE_NO(#{formulaName, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'',#{lang, jdbcType=VARCHAR},'EVS_FORMULA'), IS_INCLUDE = NVL(#{isInclude, jdbcType=VARCHAR},0), EVS_GRADE = #{evsGrade, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATED_IP = #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE SEQ = #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
